title: Enhance website content with industry-standard references from AKS Engineering

requirements.summary: Research and document AKS Engineering's content structure for infrastructure development services presentation
acceptanceCriteria: Identify key content patterns from AKS Engineering that are relevant to infrastructure development companies
Document specific improvements that align with industry standards in civil engineering presentation

file_operations.description: Review component to identify areas for enhancement based on industry-standard content patterns from established engineering firms
Analyze current service presentation structure to prepare for detailed technical content additions

requirements.summary: Enhance About Us section with detailed company credentials including metrics, certifications, and industry affiliations
acceptanceCriteria: About section includes quantifiable metrics (years in operation, projects completed, etc.)
Professional certifications and industry memberships are displayed
Content follows industry-standard formatting for engineering firms

file_operations.description: Add detailed company credentials section with quantifiable metrics (years of experience, completed project count, team size), professional certifications, and industry affiliations displayed in a structured layout with icons

requirements.summary: Expand Services section with detailed descriptions including methodologies, equipment capabilities, and technical specifications
acceptanceCriteria: Each service card includes technical details and methodologies
Service descriptions demonstrate depth of engineering capabilities
Content reflects industry-standard terminology and practices

file_operations.description: Expand each service card with detailed technical descriptions covering specific methodologies, equipment capabilities, and technical specifications that demonstrate engineering expertise using industry-standard terminology

requirements.summary: Add Projects Portfolio section showcasing completed infrastructure projects in a grid layout
acceptanceCriteria: New Projects section is added between Services and Government sections
Projects are displayed in a responsive grid layout
Each project card shows key details: name, location, value, and completion date
Section maintains consistent styling with other page sections

file_operations.description: Create Projects Portfolio section component displaying completed infrastructure projects in a responsive grid layout with project cards showing name, location, contract value, completion date, and brief description. Include generated project images using workspace paths: frontend/public/assets/generated/project-1.dim_800x600.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/project-2.dim_800x600.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/project-3.dim_800x600.png as static assets in the project cards
Import and add Projects component between Services and Government sections to wire the new portfolio section into the main application layout

requirements.summary: Enhance Government & Public Sector section with specific examples of completed government projects
acceptanceCriteria: Government section includes concrete project examples
Client names and project outcomes are listed
Content demonstrates proven track record with government entities

file_operations.description: Add specific examples of successfully completed government projects including client names, project scopes, and measurable outcomes to demonstrate proven track record with government entities

requirements.summary: Add industry certifications and quality standards section with ISO certifications and compliance badges
acceptanceCriteria: Certification badges are displayed in the Quality section
Each certification includes logo and registration number
Layout is responsive and visually organized

file_operations.description: Add industry certifications subsection displaying ISO certifications, safety accreditations, and compliance badges with logos and certification numbers in a responsive grid layout. Include generated certification images using workspace paths: frontend/public/assets/generated/iso-cert.dim_200x200.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/safety-badge.dim_200x200.png as static assets

requirements.summary: Improve hero section headline and tagline with impactful industry-specific language emphasizing infrastructure excellence
acceptanceCriteria: Hero headline is more compelling and industry-aligned
Tagline emphasizes unique value proposition
Language reflects professional engineering firm standards

file_operations.description: Update hero section headline and tagline to be more impactful and industry-specific, emphasizing infrastructure excellence and engineering innovation using language patterns common in leading engineering firms
